name: mimeType
description: Media type (MIME type) identifier specifying the format of a digital resource or bitstream.
ExpectedUse: Format identification for digital files, enabling proper handling, rendering, validation, and processing of diverse data types in repositories and computational workflows.

Properties.Name: mimeType
Properties.Title: MIME_Type
Properties.Description: The MIME-Type of the object, written in the form "type/subtype". Some often used examples are: image/png, text/csv, application/pdf, ...
